data.title: Scalable Microservices
data.description: The architecture is built to support scalable microservices to handle web traffic efficiently.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Utilizes CDN to deliver content quickly and reliably worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Integrated use of a global CDN like Akamai.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Distributes incoming web traffic across multiple servers for optimal performance.
data.technical_spec: Implementations using solutions like AWS Elastic Load Balancing.

data.title: HTTPS Everywhere
data.description: All data exchanges on the site are encrypted with HTTPS.

data.title: Progressive Web App (PWA)
data.description: Offers app-like experience in web browsers.
